feedback.text: I apreciated for your time. As I consumer, of video games product, I despise the way company take thing that I bought for years. I want to own games, so one day, when I have kids or nephew, I can share games, that I grew up, having games in digital, I do want protection the games that I bought, if their can take my games their better refund me. Not only that but it will negatively impact on the market, on the future.
